200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Mage

Event: Autumn Festival 2024

Event date: 09/01/2024

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

When any unit dies on the battlefield, the Soul Reaper takes a piece of their soul for 10 sec. Each piece of the soul increases the Soul Reaper's spell power by 2%. Stacks up to 10 times. When the Soul Reaper takes a piece of the soul, it causes an explosion of dark energy and deals magic damage equal to 20% of own spell power to all enemies. The ability triggers only once per 1 sec.

description 4/6

When any unit dies on the battlefield, the Soul Reaper takes a piece of their soul for 10 sec. Each piece of the soul increases the Soul Reaper's spell power by 3%. Stacks up to 10 times. When the Soul Reaper takes a piece of the soul, it causes an explosion of dark energy and deals magic damage equal to 30% of own spell power to all enemies. The ability triggers only once per 1 sec. Once in a while, creates a time rift, dealing 75000(+bonus of spell power) magic damage to all enemies and restoring 75000(+bonus of spell power) health to all allies. Also, the Soul Reaper's spell power increases by 3% for each dead unit on the battlefield. Stacks up to 10 times.

description 6/6

When any unit dies on the battlefield, the Soul Reaper takes a piece of their soul for 10 sec. Each piece of the soul increases the Soul Reaper's spell power by 5%. Stacks up to 10 times. When the Soul Reaper takes a piece of the soul, it causes an explosion of dark energy and deals magic damage equal to 50% of own spell power to all enemies. The ability triggers only once per 1 sec. Once in a while, creates a time rift, dealing 100000(+bonus of spell power) magic damage to all enemies and restoring 100000(+bonus of spell power) health to all allies. Also, the Soul Reaper's spell power increases by 5% for each dead unit on the battlefield. Stacks up to 10 times. Causes an explosion of necrotic energy on the nearby enemy every second, dealing 50000(+bonus of spell power) magic damage. The ability triggers even if the Soul Reaper is dead. Once in a while, when an ally dies, resurrects that ally with 25% health, dealing magic damage equal to 10% of the resurrected unit's max health t


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

The dark energy explosion deals an additional pure damage equal to 2% of the targets’ max health.

description 4/6

The dark energy explosion deals an additional pure damage equal to 3% of the targets’ max health. The Soul Reaper deals an extra 100000 magic damage to all enemies when using temporal shift. This damage ignores shields and effects that reduce the incoming damage.

description 6/6

The dark energy explosion deals an additional pure damage equal to 4% of the targets’ max health. The Soul Reaper deals an extra 120000 magic damage to all enemies when using temporal shift. This damage ignores shields and effects that reduce the incoming damage. Damage from the explosion of necrotic energy becomes pure. Also, in addition to the main target, all enemies in a small radius around it take damage from the explosion.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

In addition to increasing the spell power, each piece of soul increases the Soul Reaper’s magic and physical armor by 2% for 10sec. Stacks up to 20 times.

description 4/6

In addition to increasing the spell power, each piece of soul increases the Soul Reaper’s magic and physical armor by 3% for 10 sec. Stacks up to 20 times. The time rift freezes enemies for 1 sec. During this time, they can’t move or attack. It also increases the cooldown time of the targets’ gear and artifact abilities by 1 sec.

description 6/6

In addition to increasing the spell power, each piece of soul increases the Soul Reaper’s magic and physical armor by 5% for 10 sec. Stacks up to 20 times. The time rift freezes enemies for 2 sec. During this time, they can’t move or attack. It also increases the cooldown time of the targets’ gear and artifact abilities by 2 sec. Each second, the Soul Reaper restores 100000(+Spell Power bonus) health.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

When taking damage from the dark energy explosion, the targets have their max health reduced by 3% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

description 4/6

When taking damage from the dark energy explosion, the targets have their max health reduced by 5% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. When the time rift is triggered, the Soul Reaper’s magic armor piercing is increased by 5% for each dead unit on the battlefield.

description 6/6

When taking damage from the dark energy explosion, the targets have their max health reduced by 10% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. When the time rift is triggered, the Soul Reaper’s magic armor piercing is increased by 12% for each dead unit on the battlefield. Once in a while, the Soul Reaper increases the spell power of all allied mages by 50% of own spell power for 5 sec. Also reduces the cooldown time of all allied mages’ weapon abilities by 1 sec.

Materials

Frozen Time
Raven''s Wing
Gold Hilt
Antique Fabric
Scythe Edge
Suggested gears for the set
Lead Researcher Outfit
Shadow Fusion Outfit
Glimmering Depths Lantern
Northern Lights Lantern
Pyramid Sorcerer Outfit
